name: Glossary list

en.when_to_use: Use it to present a set of terms and definitions side by side in teaching explanations, project deliverables, or domain overviews, especially for abbreviations, specialist concepts, and team vocabulary. Explain a single term in body text; if relationships and hierarchy matter more than definitions, use a concept map.
en.why_valuable: Definitions scattered through paragraphs are hard to look up and can separate aliases or examples from their terms. This component establishes a quickly scannable reference surface with a fixed term-to-definition visual axis, optional groups, alias pills, and example blocks.

data_in.note: data.entries contains term records in display order. group is optional; the component partitions entries by each group's first appearance, preserves input order within a group, and puts ungrouped entries under Terms. aliases displays only short alias/abbreviation pills; example is an optional sentence or use case after the definition. The component does not sort, search, or modify content.

schema.description?: string -- glossary scope or reading guidance
schema.entries: {term:string,definition:string,group?:string,aliases?:string[],example?:string}[] -- term, definition, optional group, aliases, and example; displayed in input order

spec.note: Height grows with the number of terms. After the content reaches 680px, it scrolls internally and keeps group headings sticky. Below 560px, term and definition stack vertically. It uses no vh or carrier measurement.

when_to_use: 需要在教学解释、项目交付或领域概览中把一组术语与定义并排呈现时用它，尤其适合缩写、专业概念和团队词汇表；若只有一个术语直接用正文解释，若关系与层级比定义更重要则用概念图。
why_valuable: 散落在段落中的定义不易回查，也容易让别名与示例脱离术语；本组件用 term→definition 的固定视觉轴、可选分组、别名 pill 和示例块建立可快速扫描的参考面。

data_in.note: data.entries 是按展示顺序提供的术语记录。group 可选；组件按 group 首次出现顺序分区，同组条目保持原顺序，未分组项归入 Terms。aliases 只显示短别名/缩写 pill；example 是定义后的可选例句或应用场景。组件不排序、不搜索，也不修改内容。

schema.description?: string —— 词表范围或阅读提示
schema.entries: {term:string,definition:string,group?:string,aliases?:string[],example?:string}[] —— 术语、定义、可选分组、别名和例句；按输入顺序展示

spec.note: 按术语数量增高，内容区最高 680px 后内部滚动且分组标题粘住；560px 以下 term 与 definition 改为上下排列。无 vh 或载体测量。

example._why: 产品实验与交付两组真实术语同时覆盖分组、缩写别名、长短定义与示例块，能验证扫描轴和移动端堆叠。

minimal.title: Product analytics glossary
minimal.description: Shared language for experiments and delivery reviews

entries.definition: The first moment a new user experiences the product’s core value.
entries.example: Creating and sharing a first dashboard within 24 hours.

entries.definition: The smallest change an experiment is designed to distinguish from random variation.
A metric that must not deteriorate while the primary metric improves.
entries.example: Monitor refund rate while optimizing checkout conversion.

entries.definition: The shared criteria a work item must satisfy before the team considers it complete.
Elapsed time from a committed work request to production delivery.

uplink: 纯 display，无 uplink；分组、别名与例句仅用于本地阅读，没有搜索输入、选择或回传事件。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero imports/fetch/events/global footprint; grouped glossary rendered-verified
